items.title: Batch training pipelines
items.description: Offline model training jobs wrap pandas cleaning and sklearn transformers in one Pipeline so each experiment logs a single artifact and identical transforms replay across CV folds.

items.title: Real-time and batch scoring services
items.description: APIs and scheduled jobs load a joblib-serialized pipeline and call predict on fresh rows—no ad hoc scripts that recompute medians from the serving batch.

items.title: Data quality gates in ETL
items.description: Upstream ETL applies deduplication, type coercion, and sentinel-to-NaN mapping so feature stores hand ML pipelines consistent schemas before imputation and encoding.

items.title: Notebook-to-production handoff
items.description: Notebooks prototype ColumnTransformer layouts; the same Pipeline object promoted to production avoids train/serve skew from copy-pasted preprocessing cells.
